---
agent: agent
argument-hint: Add an entry to the CHANGELOG.md file for the changes made.
description: Add an entry to the CHANGELOG.md file for the changes made.
---

Study CHANGELOG.md. Add an entry under `## [Unreleased]` for the changes made. Be succinct, straight to the point, word the entry clearly for users, be explicit about the "symptom" that was addressed.
